subcodes.first_line: O Lord! These pure souls are enamored of Thee and are bewildered by Thee. Through the fire of Thy love have they been set ablaze and have rent asunder the veil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این جانهای پاک شیفته تواند و آشفته تو باتش عشق برافروختند و پرده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love as fire
